LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER'S NOTICE AND MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE (MISCALENDARED IN THE DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT) OFF CALENDAR. calendar.matters:
PETITIONER'S NOTICE AND MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
PETITIONER'S NOTICE AND MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE (miscalendared in the discovery department) Off calendar. Petitioner fails to show that the City was properly served, that the time for it to respond to the petition has run yet, and the court did not authorize petitioner to file an oversized brief. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
